data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of linking generated artifacts to quote versions. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or records that confirm this linkage. The prior steps focus on bookings and offers but do not address the necessary connection to quote versions, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of linking generated artifacts to quote versions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
